data.title: TESCO launches 4E2-1 detector for high-voltage systems, boosting safety. BRISTOL, Pa., Jan. 29, 2026 - PRNewswire.
data.description: TESCO® Metering has introduced the 4E2-1 Third Rail Voltage detection tool in Bristol, Pa., on Jan. 29, 2026. This tool enhances operator safety near high-voltage third rail systems, providing both visual and audible alerts. The tool's rugged build ensures durability in various working conditions. The launch aims to reduce accidents and improve safety at sites with high-voltage systems.

data.title: $62M raised by Escape Velocity for DePIN infrastructure projects as venture investors eye crypto bets amid struggles.
data.description: The increase highlights how venture investors are cautiously returning to crypto investments that require substantial infrastructure, as DePIN faces challenges in advancing beyond its initial token releases.

data.title: The Melting Pot in Tampa offers an interactive 4-course dining experience for Valentine's Day celebrations.
data.description: A renowned fondue eatery in Tampa, Florida, invites couples, Galentine's groups, and families to rejoice in the love-filled season. The Melting Pot, recognized as the top fondue restaurant globally, provides a distinctive four-course dining experience for those seeking the perfect spot to commemorate Valentine's Day in 2026.

data.title: TESCO introduces 326P & 326X artificial resistive loads for utility meter testing, enhancing accuracy and portability.
data.description: Cutting-edge artificial resistive loads have been introduced to revolutionize meter testing accuracy, portability, and efficiency. Developed by TESCO® Metering and announced in BRISTOL on Jan. 29, 2026, these new lightweight loads offer precise field-ready load simulation. This innovation aims to enhance meter testing procedures with improved accuracy and ease of use.Created in the United States, the advanced resistive loads are set to elevate testing standards with their innovative design.

data.title: Trump threatens 10% tariff on eight European allies opposing acquisition of Greenland, escalates tensions.
data.description: The threat by President Donald Trump to implement a 10% tariff on eight European allies who are against his interest in purchasing Greenland has heightened tensions. The tariff is set to come into effect on February 1, adding pressure as the Supreme Court decision looms.

data.title: Oroco Resource Corp. issues 7,050,000 incentive stock options to 25 individuals at $0.85 per share, vesting in 4 installments over 3 years.
data.description: Oroco Resource Corp. has granted a total of 7,050,000 incentive stock options at an exercise price of $0.85 per share, with a term of 3 years. 3,425,000 of these options have been granted to officers, directors, and senior management. The options will vest in 4 installments over the course of 12 months. The company now has 14,185,000 incentive options outstanding, equating to 4.4% of the currently issued and outstanding shares of Oroco. The Santo Tomas Project, located in northwestern Mexico, is a significant copper resource holding over 9,000 hectares of mineral concessions. The project is within 170 km of a Pacific deep-water port and is serviced by highways, rail, power lines, and natural gas. The company plans to continue development towards a completed Pre-Feasibility Study. For more information, contact Mr. Craig Dalziel, Executive Chairman of Oroco Resource Corp.

data.title: CFTC and SEC chairs join forces to coordinate oversight on cryptocurrencies, united front at joint event.
data.description: The heads of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) and Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) made a joint appearance at an agency event on Thursday to address the need for a cohesive strategy regarding cryptocurrency regulation. The event garnered attention as the two agencies discussed coordinating their efforts in overseeing the digital asset space. The collaboration between the CFTC and SEC reflects a growing importance as the market cap of cryptocurrencies has exceeded $2 trillion, making it imperative for regulators to work together to ensure market integrity and investor protection in this rapidly evolving market.

data.title: Pensacola Yacht Club to host 2026 International WASZP Games from Mar 16-28, bringing premier foiling championship to North America.
data.description: From March 16 to 28, 2026, the Pensacola Yacht Club (PYC) in Pensacola, Florida, will be the host of the 2026 International WASZP Games. This event, announced on January 29, 2026, marks the first time the world's premier foiling championship will take place in North America. The Gulf Coast will be the center of attention during this period as the games draw sailors and enthusiasts from around the globe.

data.title: Oxford Bank Corp announces Q4 2025 results in Oxford, Mich. Key details: Holding company for Oxford Bank, OXBC on OTC Bulletin Board.
data.description: Oxford Bank Corporation, the parent company of Oxford Bank, revealed its operating performance for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The Company, identified as OXBC on the OTC Bulletin Board exchange, shared the results without specifying the actual numbers.

data.title: Nine cities awarded $1,000,000 each for Healthy & Sustainable Communities Grant Program, Portland, Spokane, and Findlay among winners.
data.description: In the latest announcement, the 2026 Healthy and Sustainable Communities Awards have recognized Portland (OR), Spokane (WA), and Findlay (OH) as the top winners. This prestigious award highlights the outstanding efforts of these cities in promoting health and sustainability. The recognition showcases their dedication to creating better living environments for their residents. The awards were presented by American Beverage and the American Beverage Foundation for a Healthy America (ABFHA) in partnership with the United States Conference. Congratulations to Portland (OR), Spokane (WA), and Findlay (OH) for leading the way in building healthier and more sustainable communities.
US money-market fund assets rise to $7.71 trillion at ICI, rising for the first time in three weeks.

data.title: Altowav boosts sales leadership with Eric Thune as EVP, Marina Savy as Director. AltoPlex product line shipping globally.
data.description: Minneapolis-based Altowav, a leading provider of 60GHz technology solutions, has announced significant progress with its AltoPlex product line, which is now fully available for shipping. The company has established a strong presence globally through a network of representatives, distributors, and systems integrators. Customers have transitioned from initial deployments to larger-scale projects, indicating a growing market demand. In response to this positive momentum, Altowav has appointed Eric Thune, a seasoned enterprise sales professional with 30 years of experience, as the Executive Vice President of Sales. Additionally, Marina Savy has been promoted to Director of Channel Sales. Both appointments are aimed at further capitalizing on the company's current growth trajectory.

data.title: Researcher Raghu Kulkarni unifies black hole anomalies and particle chirality mysteries in groundbreaking papers.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Calabasas, California, CEO Raghu Kulkarni of IDrive Inc. presented two significant papers to Physical Review Letters. Kulkarni, an independent researcher, introduced a pioneering geometric theory addressing persistent queries in physics. The proposed solution aims to tackle the mysteries surrounding black holes, offering a unified approach to understanding these phenomena. This breakthrough research has the potential to revolutionize the field, marking a milestone in scientific exploration.

data.title: MLG Capital ends 2025 on a high note with acquisitions of Platte View Landing and Castro Valley Portfolio.
data.description: MLG Capital, a prominent player in diversified private real estate investment, recently revealed the completion of two major multifamily acquisitions in December - Platte View Landing and the Castro Valley Portfolio. These acquisitions mark significant milestones for the company as they continue to expand their portfolio. No specific numbers were provided.

data.title: ETF assets reach $13.37 trillion in December 2026, as reported by ICI. Monthly data also shows share value issuance and redemption.
data.description: In December of 2025, the total assets of exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in the country amounted to $13.37 trillion, as reported by the Investment Company Institute. The Institute's regular statistical report also covers the valuation of shares issued and redeemed by ETFs.

data.title: Faneuil Hall Marketplace in Boston to host live snow sculpting sessions by artist Sean Fitzpatrick, known as Fitzysnowman Studios, over multiple weekends this winter.
data.description: Boston's Faneuil Hall Marketplace has announced a special event featuring acclaimed artist Sean Fitzpatrick, also known as Fitzysnowman Studios. The renowned artist will be conducting live snow-sculpting sessions over several weekends during the current winter season. The inaugural session will take place on January 29, 2026.
